title: Cyathea hancockii
taxonomy: Cyathea hancockii belongs to the family Cyatheaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the tree ferns. It is classified under the genus Cyathea, which includes many species of tree ferns. The species Cyathea hancockii is native to China and has been recorded in various regions, including the subtropical zones. This classification places Cyathea hancockii within the kingdom Plantae, as it is a vascular plant. At the highest taxonomic level, Cyathea hancockii falls under the domain Eukarya, which includes all eukaryotic organisms.
